message.content:
@startuml
!option handwritten true

title 借出图书 用例

actor "图书管理员" as librarian
interface "账号判断" as accountCheck
interface "业务控制" as businessControl
database "数据库" as database

rectangle "读者账号合法性验证" {
  librarian -> accountCheck : 1 输入读者账号信息
  accountCheck -> businessControl : 2 获取账号信息
  businessControl -> database : 3 比对账号密码合法性
  database --> businessControl : 4 账号合法
}

rectangle "借出图书" {
  librarian -> businessControl : 5 输入借出图书信息
  businessControl -> database : 6 增加借阅信息
  businessControl -> database : 7 修改图书库存
  database --> businessControl : 8 返回操作结果
  businessControl --> librarian : 9 返回借出结果
}

@enduml
